message.content: Module not specified while running emulator

content.text:
This usually means the Android Studio run configuration is missing the module setting. Here's how to fix it:

1. In Android Studio, go to **Run → Edit Configurations...**
2. Select your app configuration (usually named "app")
3. In the **Module** dropdown, select `app`
4. Click **Apply → OK**
5. Try running again

If that doesn't work, or if you don't see a run configuration at all:

1. Go to **Run → Edit Configurations...**
2. Click the **+** button → **Android App**
3. Set **Name**: `app`
4. Set **Module**: `app`
5. Click **Apply → OK**

Alternatively, you can click the green play button in the toolbar — if it shows a module selector dropdown next to it, make sure `app` is selected there.

Does one of these match what you're seeing?

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" />

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules"
        android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules"
        android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.Combined_schedule">
        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:label="@string/app_name"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.Combined_schedule">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />

                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>

        <receiver
            android:name=".receiver.BusReminderReceiver"
            android:exported="false" />

        <receiver
            android:name=".receiver.HomeReminderReceiver"
            android:exported="false" />

        <receiver
            android:name=".receiver.BootReceiver"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>
    </application>

</manifest>

content.text:
The best way to diagnose this is to look at the **Logcat** in Android Studio. Here's how:

1. Run the app
2. When it crashes, go to **View → Tool Windows → Logcat** (or the Logcat tab at the bottom)
3. Filter by **"Error"** or search for **"FATAL"** or **"AndroidRuntime"**
4. Copy the red error message and stack trace here

That will tell us exactly what's crashing and where.

**Common causes** for this project:

- **Network on main thread** — if `WeatherRepository` or `BusRepository` makes a network call without a coroutine/background thread
- **Missing permission** — location or notification permission not granted at runtime
- **Room database schema mismatch** — if the database was installed before and the schema changed

Can you paste the Logcat error output here?

    13→    /** Cache: avoid hammering the API on every recompose. */

    25→        val conn = URL(url).openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
    26→        conn.connectTimeout = 8_000

    34→    private fun buildUrl(lat: Double, lng: Double): String =
    35→        "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast" +
    36→            "?latitude=$lat&longitude=$lng" +
    37→            "&current=temperature_2m,apparent_temperature,weather_code," +
    38→            "wind_speed_10m,relative_humidity_2m,precipitation" +
    39→            "&hourly=temperature_2m,weather_code,precipitation_probability" +
    40→            "&daily=weather_code,temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min," +
    41→            "precipitation_probability_max" +
    42→            "&temperature_unit=fahrenheit" +
    43→            "&wind_speed_unit=mph" +
    44→            "&precipitation_unit=inch" +
    45→            "&timezone=America%2FChicago" +
    46→            "&forecast_days=7"
    47→
    48→    private fun parse(json: String, lat: Double, lng: Double): WeatherData {
    49→        val root = JSONObject(json)
    50→
    51→        // ── Current ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    52→        val cur = root.getJSONObject("current")
    53→        val currentTime = cur.getString("time")  // "2026-04-13T14:00"
    54→        val current = CurrentWeather(
    55→            tempF       = cur.getDouble("temperature_2m"),
    56→            feelsLikeF  = cur.getDouble("apparent_temperature"),
    57→            weatherCode = cur.getInt("weather_code"),
    58→            humidity    = cur.getInt("relative_humidity_2m"),
    59→            windMph     = cur.getDouble("wind_speed_10m"),
    60→            precipInch  = cur.optDouble("precipitation", 0.0)
    61→        )
    62→
    63→        // ── Hourly — find current-hour index, take next 24 slots ──────────────
    64→        val hourlyObj  = root.getJSONObject("hourly")
    65→        val hTimes     = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("time")
    66→        val hTemps     = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("temperature_2m")
    67→        val hCodes     = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("weather_code")
    68→        val hPrecip    = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("precipitation_probability")
    69→

    71→        var startIdx = 0
    72→        for (i in 0 until hTimes.length()) {
    73→            if (hTimes.getString(i).startsWith(curHourPrefix)) { startIdx = i; break }
    74→        }

    76→            HourlyForecast(

    99→            )

   103→        return WeatherData(current, hourlyList, dailyList, locationName)
   104→    }

file.content:
package com.example.combined_schedule.data

import org.json.JSONObject
import java.net.HttpURLConnection
import java.net.URL

object WeatherRepository {

    // UIUC campus fallback coordinates
    private const val UIUC_LAT = 40.1020
    private const val UIUC_LNG = -88.2272

    /** Cache: avoid hammering the API on every recompose. */
    @Volatile private var cached: WeatherData? = null
    private const val CACHE_TTL_MS = 10 * 60 * 1000L  // 10 minutes

    fun getCached(): WeatherData? {
        val c = cached ?: return null
        return if (System.currentTimeMillis() - c.fetchedAt < CACHE_TTL_MS) c else null
    }

    /** Fetch fresh weather data. Throws on network/parse failure. */
    fun fetch(lat: Double = UIUC_LAT, lng: Double = UIUC_LNG): WeatherData {
        val url = buildUrl(lat, lng)
        val conn = URL(url).openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
        conn.connectTimeout = 8_000
        conn.readTimeout = 8_000
        val json = conn.inputStream.bufferedReader().readText()
        val data = parse(json, lat, lng)
        cached = data
        return data
    }

    private fun buildUrl(lat: Double, lng: Double): String =
        "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast" +
            "?latitude=$lat&longitude=$lng" +
            "&current=temperature_2m,apparent_temperature,weather_code," +
            "wind_speed_10m,relative_humidity_2m,precipitation" +
            "&hourly=temperature_2m,weather_code,precipitation_probability" +
            "&daily=weather_code,temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min," +
            "precipitation_probability_max" +
            "&temperature_unit=fahrenheit" +
            "&wind_speed_unit=mph" +
            "&precipitation_unit=inch" +
            "&timezone=America%2FChicago" +
            "&forecast_days=7"

    private fun parse(json: String, lat: Double, lng: Double): WeatherData {
        val root = JSONObject(json)

        // ── Current ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        val cur = root.getJSONObject("current")
        val currentTime = cur.getString("time")  // "2026-04-13T14:00"
        val current = CurrentWeather(
            tempF       = cur.getDouble("temperature_2m"),
            feelsLikeF  = cur.getDouble("apparent_temperature"),
            weatherCode = cur.getInt("weather_code"),
            humidity    = cur.getInt("relative_humidity_2m"),
            windMph     = cur.getDouble("wind_speed_10m"),
            precipInch  = cur.optDouble("precipitation", 0.0)
        )

        // ── Hourly — find current-hour index, take next 24 slots ──────────────
        val hourlyObj  = root.getJSONObject("hourly")
        val hTimes     = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("time")
        val hTemps     = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("temperature_2m")
        val hCodes     = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("weather_code")
        val hPrecip    = hourlyObj.getJSONArray("precipitation_probability")

        val curHourPrefix = currentTime.substring(0, 13)  // "2026-04-13T14"
        var startIdx = 0
        for (i in 0 until hTimes.length()) {
            if (hTimes.getString(i).startsWith(curHourPrefix)) { startIdx = i; break }
        }
        val hourlyList = (startIdx until minOf(startIdx + 24, hTimes.length())).map { i ->
            HourlyForecast(
                time              = hTimes.getString(i),
                tempF             = hTemps.getDouble(i),
                weatherCode       = hCodes.getInt(i),
                precipProbability = hPrecip.optInt(i, 0)
            )
        }

        // ── Daily ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        val dailyObj  = root.getJSONObject("daily")
        val dTimes    = dailyObj.getJSONArray("time")
        val dCodes    = dailyObj.getJSONArray("weather_code")
        val dMax      = dailyObj.getJSONArray("temperature_2m_max")
        val dMin      = dailyObj.getJSONArray("temperature_2m_min")
        val dPrecip   = dailyObj.getJSONArray("precipitation_probability_max")

        val dailyList = (0 until dTimes.length()).map { i ->
            DailyForecast(
                date               = dTimes.getString(i),
                maxTempF           = dMax.getDouble(i),
                minTempF           = dMin.getDouble(i),
                weatherCode        = dCodes.getInt(i),
                precipProbability  = dPrecip.optInt(i, 0)
            )
        }

        val locationName = if (isNearUIUC(lat, lng)) "Champaign, IL" else "Near You"
        return WeatherData(current, hourlyList, dailyList, locationName)
    }

    private fun isNearUIUC(lat: Double, lng: Double) =
        Math.abs(lat - UIUC_LAT) < 0.5 && Math.abs(lng - UIUC_LNG) < 0.5
}

    35→// ── Weather info helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    36→
    37→private data class WeatherInfo(val emoji: String, val label: String)
    38→
    39→private fun weatherInfo(code: Int): WeatherInfo = when (code) {
    40→    0            -> WeatherInfo("☀️", "Clear Sky")
    41→    1            -> WeatherInfo("🌤️", "Mainly Clear")
    42→    2            -> WeatherInfo("⛅", "Partly Cloudy")
    43→    3            -> WeatherInfo("☁️", "Overcast")
    44→    in 45..48    -> WeatherInfo("🌫️", "Foggy")
    45→    in 51..55    -> WeatherInfo("🌦️", "Drizzle")
    46→    in 61..65    -> WeatherInfo("🌧️", "Rain")
    47→    in 71..77    -> WeatherInfo("❄️", "Snow")
    48→    in 80..82    -> WeatherInfo("🌦️", "Showers")
    49→    in 85..86    -> WeatherInfo("❄️", "Snow Showers")
    50→    95           -> WeatherInfo("⛈️", "Thunderstorm")
    51→    in 96..99    -> WeatherInfo("⛈️", "Thunderstorm")
    52→    else         -> WeatherInfo("🌡️", "Unknown")
    53→}
    54→
    55→/** "2026-04-13T14:00" → "2 PM" */
    56→private fun formatHour(isoDateTime: String): String {
    57→    return try {
    58→        val time = LocalTime.parse(isoDateTime.substring(11, 16))
    59→        time.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h a", Locale.ENGLISH))
    60→    } catch (_: Exception) { isoDateTime.substring(11, 16) }
    61→}
    62→
    63→/** "2026-04-13" → "Mon" / "Today" */
    64→private fun formatDayLabel(isoDate: String): String {
    65→    return try {
    66→        val date = LocalDate.parse(isoDate)
    67→        if (date == LocalDate.now()) "Today"
    68→        else date.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEE", Locale.ENGLISH))
    69→    } catch (_: Exception) { isoDate }
    70→}
    71→
    72→private fun Int.tempString() = "${this}°"
    73→private fun Double.roundTemp() = Math.round(this).toInt()

    75→// ── Screen ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

   286→@Composable
   287→private fun DetailChip(emoji: String, value: String, label: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
   288→    Card(
   289→        modifier = modifier,

   299→            Text(value, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
   300→            Text(label, style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   301→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   302→        }
   303→    }
   304→}
   305→
   306→// ── Hourly card ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   307→
   308→@Composable
   309→private fun HourlyCard(hour: HourlyForecast) {
   310→    val info = weatherInfo(hour.weatherCode)
   311→    Card(
   312→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   313→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant)
   314→    ) {
   315→        Column(

   318→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   319→        ) {
   320→            Text(
   321→                text = formatHour(hour.time),
   322→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   323→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   324→            )
   325→            Text(info.emoji, fontSize = 22.sp)
   326→            Text(
   327→                text = hour.tempF.roundTemp().tempString(),
   328→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   329→                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   330→            )
   331→            if (hour.precipProbability > 0) {
   332→                Text(
   333→                    text = "${hour.precipProbability}%",
   334→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   335→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   336→                )
   337→            }
   338→        }
   339→    }
   340→}
   341→
   342→// ── Daily row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   343→
   344→@Composable
   345→private fun DailyRow(day: DailyForecast) {
   346→    val info = weatherInfo(day.weatherCode)
   347→
   348→    Row(
   349→        modifier = Modifier
   350→            .fillMaxWidth()
   351→            .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
   352→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   353→    ) {
   354→        // Day label
   355→        Text(
   356→            text = formatDayLabel(day.date),
   357→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   358→            fontWeight = if (formatDayLabel(day.date) == "Today") FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Normal,
   359→            modifier = Modifier.width(56.dp)
   360→        )
   361→
   362→        // Weather emoji
   363→        Text(info.emoji, fontSize = 22.sp, modifier = Modifier.width(40.dp))
   364→
   365→        // Condition
   366→        Text(
   367→            text = info.label,
   368→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   369→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   370→            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
   371→        )
   372→
   373→        // Rain probability
   374→        if (day.precipProbability > 0) {
   375→            Text(
   376→                text = "💧${day.precipProbability}%",
   377→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   378→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   379→                modifier = Modifier.padding(end = 10.dp)
   380→            )
   381→        }
   382→
   383→        // High / Low
   384→        Text(
   385→            text = "${day.maxTempF.roundTemp()}° / ${day.minTempF.roundTemp()}°",
   386→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   387→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   388→        )
   389→    }
   390→
   391→    HorizontalDivider(
   392→        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp),
   393→        thickness = 0.5.dp,
   394→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant
   395→    )
   396→}
   397→
   398→// ── Section header ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   399→
   400→@Composable
   401→private fun SectionHeader(title: String) {
   402→    Text(
   403→        text = title,
   404→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   405→        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   406→        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp)
   407→    )
   408→}

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.foundation.clickable
     4→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
     5→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.LazyColumn
     6→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.items
     7→import androidx.compose.foundation.shape.RoundedCornerShape
     8→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
     9→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.*
    10→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    11→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    12→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.draw.alpha
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
    16→import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
    17→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    18→import androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.compose.viewModel
    19→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.HomeEntry
    20→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.NotificationSettingsRepository
    21→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.Work
    22→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.WorkRepository
    23→import com.example.combined_schedule.ui.viewmodel.HomeEntryViewModel
    24→import com.example.combined_schedule.util.DateUtils
    25→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
    26→import java.time.Duration
    27→import java.time.LocalDate
    28→import java.time.LocalTime
    29→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    30→import java.time.format.TextStyle
    31→import java.util.Locale
    32→
    33→@Composable
    34→fun HomeScreen(
    35→    onNavigateToAddEdit: () -> Unit = {},
    36→    onNavigateToNotifications: () -> Unit = {},
    37→    onCourseClick: (HomeEntry) -> Unit = {},
    38→    onEditEntry: (String) -> Unit = {}
    39→) {
    40→    val context = LocalContext.current
    41→    val vm: HomeEntryViewModel = viewModel(factory = HomeEntryViewModel.Factory(context))
    42→    val allEntries by vm.entries.collectAsState()
    43→
    44→    val settingsRepo = remember { NotificationSettingsRepository.getInstance(context) }
    45→    val notificationsEnabled by settingsRepo.globalEnabled.collectAsState()
    46→
    47→    val workRepo = remember { WorkRepository.getInstance(context) }
    48→    val allWorks by workRepo.getAll().collectAsState()
    49→
    50→    val today = LocalDate.now()
    51→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d", java.util.Locale.ENGLISH)
    52→    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)
    53→    val todayShort = today.dayOfWeek.getDisplayName(TextStyle.SHORT, Locale.ENGLISH)
    54→
    55→    // Live clock — refreshes every 30 seconds
    56→    var currentTime by remember { mutableStateOf(LocalTime.now()) }
    57→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
    58→        while (true) {
    59→            delay(30_000L)
    60→            currentTime = LocalTime.now()
    61→        }
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    // Filter to today's entries, sorted by time
    65→    val todayEntries = remember(allEntries, todayShort) {
    66→        allEntries
    67→            .filter { todayShort in it.daysOfWeek }
    68→            .sortedBy { it.time }
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    val pastEntries = todayEntries.filter { entryTime(it).isBefore(currentTime) }
    72→    val upcomingEntries = todayEntries.filter { !entryTime(it).isBefore(currentTime) }
    73→    val nextEntry = upcomingEntries.firstOrNull()
    74→
    75→    // Incomplete Work items due today or overdue, sorted with today's first
    76→    val dueWorks = remember(allWorks, today) {
    77→        allWorks
    78→            .filter { !it.isCompleted && DateUtils.isDueOrOverdue(it.dueDate, today) }
    79→            .sortedBy { it.dueDate }
    80→    }
    81→
    82→    Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
    83→        LazyColumn(
    84→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    85→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 16.dp),
    86→        ) {
    87→            // ── Header ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    88→            item {
    89→                HeaderSection(
    90→                    formattedDate = formattedDate,
    91→                    remainingCount = upcomingEntries.size,
    92→                    notificationsEnabled = notificationsEnabled,
    93→                    onNotificationsClick = onNavigateToNotifications
    94→                )
    95→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    96→            }
    97→
    98→            // ── Next Event Banner ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    99→            item {
   100→                if (nextEntry != null) {
   101→                    NextEventBanner(entry = nextEntry, currentTime = currentTime)
   102→                } else {
   103→                    NoMoreEventsCard()
   104→                }
   105→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
   106→            }
   107→
   108→            // ── Today's upcoming entries ──────────────────────────────────────
   109→            item {
   110→                Text(
   111→                    text = "Today's Schedule",
   112→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   113→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   114→                )
   115→                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   116→            }
   117→
   118→            if (upcomingEntries.isEmpty() && pastEntries.isEmpty()) {
   119→                item {
   120→                    Text(
   121→                        text = "Nothing scheduled for today — tap + to add an entry.",
   122→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   123→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   124→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   125→                    )
   126→                }
   127→            } else if (upcomingEntries.isEmpty()) {
   128→                item {
   129→                    Text(
   130→                        text = "All done for today!",
   131→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   132→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   133→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   134→                    )
   135→                }
   136→            } else {
   137→                items(upcomingEntries, key = { it.id }) { entry ->
   138→                    EntryListItem(
   139→                        entry = entry,
   140→                        isPast = false,
   141→                        onClick = { if (!entry.isBus) onCourseClick(entry) },
   142→                        onEdit = { onEditEntry(entry.id) }
   143→                    )
   144→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   145→                }
   146→            }
   147→
   148→            // ── Past entries (greyed out) ─────────────────────────────────────
   149→            if (pastEntries.isNotEmpty()) {
   150→                item {
   151→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   152→                    Text(
   153→                        text = "Earlier today",
   154→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   155→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   156→                    )
   157→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   158→                }
   159→                items(pastEntries, key = { "past_${it.id}" }) { entry ->
   160→                    EntryListItem(
   161→                        entry = entry,
   162→                        isPast = true,
   163→                        onClick = { if (!entry.isBus) onCourseClick(entry) },
   164→                        onEdit = { onEditEntry(entry.id) }
   165→                    )
   166→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   167→                }
   168→            }
   169→
   170→            // ── Due Today / Overdue assignments ───────────────────────────────
   171→            if (dueWorks.isNotEmpty()) {
   172→                item {
   173→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   174→                    Text(
   175→                        text = "Due Today",
   176→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   177→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   178→                    )
   179→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   180→                }
   181→                items(dueWorks, key = { "due_${it.id}" }) { work ->
   182→                    DueWorkItem(work = work, today = today)
   183→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   184→                }
   185→            }
   186→
   187→            item { Spacer(Modifier.height(72.dp)) }
   188→        }
   189→
   190→        FloatingActionButton(
   191→            onClick = onNavigateToAddEdit,
   192→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   193→            modifier = Modifier
   194→                .align(Alignment.BottomEnd)
   195→                .padding(16.dp)
   196→        ) {
   197→            Icon(Icons.Default.Add, contentDescription = "Add entry")
   198→        }
   199→    }
   200→}

   202→@Composable
   203→private fun DueWorkItem(work: Work, today: LocalDate) {
   204→    val workDate = DateUtils.parseIsoDate(work.dueDate)
   205→    val isOverdue = workDate != null && workDate.isBefore(today)
   206→
   207→    Card(
   208→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   209→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   210→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   211→            containerColor = if (isOverdue)
   212→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
   213→            else
   214→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   215→        ),
   216→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = if (isOverdue) 0.dp else 2.dp)
   217→    ) {
   218→        Row(
   219→            modifier = Modifier
   220→                .fillMaxWidth()
   221→                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   222→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   223→        ) {
   224→            Text("📝", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge)
   225→            Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   226→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   227→                Text(
   228→                    text = work.title,
   229→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   230→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   231→                )
   232→                Text(
   233→                    text = work.courseTitle,
   234→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   235→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   236→                )
   237→            }
   238→            if (isOverdue) {
   239→                Surface(
   240→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp),
   241→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   242→                ) {
   243→                    Text(
   244→                        "OVERDUE",
   245→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   246→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onError,
   247→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   248→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 2.dp)
   249→                    )
   250→                }
   251→            }
   252→        }
   253→    }
   254→}
   255→
   256→private fun entryTime(entry: HomeEntry): LocalTime {
   257→    val parts = entry.time.split(":")
   258→    val h = parts.getOrNull(0)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   259→    val m = parts.getOrNull(1)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   260→    return LocalTime.of(h, m)
   261→}

   325→// ─── Next Event Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   326→
   327→@Composable
   328→private fun NextEventBanner(entry: HomeEntry, currentTime: LocalTime) {
   329→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", java.util.Locale.ENGLISH)
   330→    val entryLocalTime = entryTime(entry)
   331→    val minutesUntil = Duration.between(currentTime, entryLocalTime).toMinutes()
   332→
   333→    val countdownText = when {
   334→        minutesUntil <= 0 -> "Starting now"
   335→        minutesUntil < 60 -> "in $minutesUntil min"
   336→        else -> {
   337→            val h = minutesUntil / 60
   338→            val m = minutesUntil % 60
   339→            if (m == 0L) "in ${h}h" else "in ${h}h ${m}m"
   340→        }
   341→    }
   342→
   343→    Card(
   344→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   345→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   346→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer),
   347→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 6.dp)
   348→    ) {
   349→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(20.dp)) {
   350→            Row(
   351→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   352→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   353→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   354→            ) {
   355→                Text(
   356→                    text = "UP NEXT",
   357→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   358→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   359→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   360→                )
   361→                Surface(shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp), color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary) {
   362→                    Text(
   363→                        text = countdownText,
   364→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   365→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   366→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   367→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 5.dp)
   368→                    )
   369→                }
   370→            }
   371→
   372→            Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   373→
   374→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   375→                Text(text = if (entry.isBus) "🚌" else "📚", style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium)
   376→                Spacer(Modifier.width(14.dp))
   377→                Column {
   378→                    Text(
   379→                        text = entry.title,
   380→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   381→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   382→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
   383→                    )
   384→                    Text(
   385→                        text = entryLocalTime.format(timeFormatter),
   386→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   387→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
   388→                    )
   389→                }
   390→            }
   391→
   392→            if (entry.location.isNotEmpty()) {
   393→                Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
   394→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   395→                    Icon(
   396→                        imageVector = Icons.Default.LocationOn,
   397→                        contentDescription = null,
   398→                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f),
   399→                        modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   400→                    )
   401→                    Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
   402→                    Text(
   403→                        text = entry.location,
   404→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   405→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   406→                    )
   407→                }
   408→            }
   409→        }
   410→    }
   411→}

   118→   118→    "Main & Wright"     to (40.1106 to -88.2271),

   120→   120→    "Lincoln Hall"      to (40.1072 to -88.2291),
   121→   121→    "Armory"            to (40.1036 to -88.2316),

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.data
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.SharingStarted
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.stateIn
    10→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    11→
    12→class LocationRepository(context: Context) {
    13→
    14→    private val dao = AppDatabase.getInstance(context).savedLocationDao()
    15→    private val scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.IO)
    16→
    17→    private val allLocations: StateFlow<List<SavedLocation>> = dao.getAll()
    18→        .stateIn(scope, SharingStarted.Eagerly, emptyList())
    19→
    20→    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<SavedLocation>> = allLocations
    21→
    22→    fun insert(location: SavedLocation) { scope.launch { dao.insert(location) } }
    23→    fun delete(location: SavedLocation) { scope.launch { dao.delete(location) } }
    24→
    25→    companion object {
    26→        @Volatile private var INSTANCE: LocationRepository? = null
    27→
    28→        fun getInstance(context: Context): LocationRepository =
    29→            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
    30→                LocationRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
    31→            }
    32→    }
    33→}
    34→

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.viewmodel
     2→
     3→import android.app.AlarmManager
     4→import android.app.Application
     5→import android.app.NotificationChannel
     6→import android.app.NotificationManager
     7→import android.app.PendingIntent
     8→import android.content.Context
     9→import android.content.Intent
    10→import android.os.Build
    11→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
    12→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
    13→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
    14→import androidx.lifecycle.AndroidViewModel
    15→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
    16→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
    17→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.BusRepository
    18→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.SavedBusTrip
    19→import com.example.combined_schedule.receiver.BusReminderReceiver
    20→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    21→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
    22→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
    23→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
    24→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    25→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    26→import org.json.JSONArray
    27→import org.json.JSONObject
    28→import java.net.HttpURLConnection
    29→import java.net.URL
    30→import java.net.URLEncoder
    31→import java.time.Duration
    32→import java.time.LocalTime
    33→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    34→import java.util.Locale
    35→
    36→data class PlaceResult(
    37→    val name: String,
    38→    val displayName: String,
    39→    val lat: Double,
    40→    val lng: Double
    41→)
    42→
    43→class BusScheduleViewModel(
    44→    private val repo: BusRepository,
    45→    private val app: Application
    46→) : AndroidViewModel(app) {
    47→
    48→    val trips: StateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>> = repo.getAll()
    49→
    50→    private val _liveArrivals = MutableStateFlow<Map<String, List<String>>>(emptyMap())
    51→    val liveArrivals: StateFlow<Map<String, List<String>>> = _liveArrivals.asStateFlow()
    52→
    53→    // Tracks which routes are currently loading live data so each card shows its own spinner.
    54→    private val _loadingRoutes = MutableStateFlow<Set<String>>(emptySet())
    55→    val loadingRoutes: StateFlow<Set<String>> = _loadingRoutes.asStateFlow()
    56→
    57→    // ── Place search ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    58→    private val _searchResults = MutableStateFlow<List<PlaceResult>>(emptyList())
    59→    val searchResults: StateFlow<List<PlaceResult>> = _searchResults.asStateFlow()
    60→
    61→    var isSearching by mutableStateOf(false)
    62→        private set
    63→
    64→    var selectedPlace by mutableStateOf<PlaceResult?>(null)
    65→        private set
    66→
    67→    fun searchPlaces(query: String) {
    68→        if (query.isBlank()) { _searchResults.value = emptyList(); return }
    69→        viewModelScope.launch {
    70→            isSearching = true
    71→            val results = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    72→                try {
    73→                    val encoded = URLEncoder.encode(query, "UTF-8")
    74→                    val url = URL(
    75→                        "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search" +
    76→                        "?q=$encoded&format=json&limit=5" +
    77→                        "&viewbox=-88.35,40.15,-88.10,40.05&bounded=0"
    78→                    )
    79→                    val conn = url.openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
    80→                    conn.setRequestProperty("User-Agent", "CombinedScheduleApp/1.0 (Android)")
    81→                    conn.connectTimeout = 5_000
    82→                    conn.readTimeout = 5_000
    83→                    val json = conn.inputStream.bufferedReader().readText()
    84→                    parseNominatimResults(json)
    85→                } catch (_: Exception) { emptyList() }
    86→            }
    87→            _searchResults.value = results
    88→            isSearching = false
    89→        }
    90→    }
    91→
    92→    fun selectPlace(place: PlaceResult) {
    93→        selectedPlace = place
    94→        _searchResults.value = emptyList()
    95→    }
    96→
    97→    fun clearSearch() {
    98→        selectedPlace = null
    99→        _searchResults.value = emptyList()
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    private fun parseNominatimResults(json: String): List<PlaceResult> {
   103→        val results = mutableListOf<PlaceResult>()
   104→        try {
   105→            val arr = JSONArray(json)
   106→            for (i in 0 until arr.length().coerceAtMost(5)) {
   107→                val obj = arr.getJSONObject(i)
   108→                val name = obj.optString("name").ifBlank {
   109→                    obj.optString("display_name").substringBefore(",").trim()
   110→                }
   111→                val displayName = obj.optString("display_name")
   112→                val lat = obj.optDouble("lat", 0.0)
   113→                val lng = obj.optDouble("lon", 0.0)
   114→                if (lat != 0.0 && lng != 0.0) {
   115→                    results.add(PlaceResult(name, displayName, lat, lng))
   116→                }
   117→            }
   118→        } catch (_: Exception) { /* graceful fallback */ }
   119→        return results
   120→    }
   121→
   122→    fun fetchLiveArrivals(routeName: String) {
   123→        viewModelScope.launch {
   124→            _loadingRoutes.value = _loadingRoutes.value + routeName
   125→            val result = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   126→                try {
   127→                    val encoded = URLEncoder.encode(routeName, "UTF-8")
   128→                    val url = URL(
   129→                        "https://developer.cumtd.com/api/v2.2/json/getdeparturestimesbyroute" +
   130→                                "?key=$CUMTD_API_KEY&route_id=$encoded"
   131→                    )
   132→                    val conn = url.openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
   133→                    conn.connectTimeout = 5_000
   134→                    conn.readTimeout = 5_000
   135→                    val json = conn.inputStream.bufferedReader().readText()
   136→                    parseCumtdDepartures(json)
   137→                } catch (_: Exception) {
   138→                    null
   139→                }
   140→            }
   141→            if (result != null) {
   142→                _liveArrivals.value = _liveArrivals.value + (routeName to result)
   143→            }
   144→            _loadingRoutes.value = _loadingRoutes.value - routeName
   145→        }
   146→    }
   147→
   148→    private fun parseCumtdDepartures(json: String): List<String> {
   149→        val formatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", Locale.ENGLISH)
   150→        val times = mutableListOf<String>()
   151→        try {
   152→            val root = JSONObject(json)
   153→            val departures = root.optJSONArray("departures") ?: return emptyList()
   154→            for (i in 0 until departures.length().coerceAtMost(5)) {
   155→                val dep = departures.getJSONObject(i)
   156→                val expected = dep.optString("expected_start", "")
   157→                if (expected.isNotBlank()) {
   158→                    // CUMTD returns ISO-8601 datetime; extract HH:mm from the time portion
   159→                    val timePart = expected.substringAfter("T").take(5)
   160→                    val lt = LocalTime.parse(timePart)
   161→                    times.add(lt.format(formatter))
   162→                }
   163→            }
   164→        } catch (_: Exception) { /* graceful fallback — show nothing */ }
   165→        return times
   166→    }
   167→
   168→    fun insert(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.insert(trip)
   169→    fun update(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.update(trip)
   170→    fun delete(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.delete(trip)
   171→
   172→    fun scheduleReminder(trip: SavedBusTrip, departureTime: LocalTime) {
   173→        // "None" reminder means the user does not want a notification for this trip.
   174→        if (trip.reminderMinutes <= 0) return
   175→        val minutesUntil = Duration.between(LocalTime.now(), departureTime).toMinutes()
   176→        val leadMinutes = trip.reminderMinutes.toLong()
   177→        if (minutesUntil <= leadMinutes) return
   178→
   179→        val triggerMs = System.currentTimeMillis() + (minutesUntil - leadMinutes) * 60_000L
   180→
   181→        val intent = Intent(app, BusReminderReceiver::class.java).apply {
   182→            putExtra("routeName", trip.routeName)
   183→            putExtra("time", departureTime.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", Locale.ENGLISH)))
   184→        }
   185→        val pi = PendingIntent.getBroadcast(
   186→            app,
   187→            trip.id.hashCode(),
   188→            intent,
   189→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   190→        )
   191→
   192→        val am = app.getSystemService(AlarmManager::class.java)
   193→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S && !am.canScheduleExactAlarms()) return
   194→        am.setExactAndAllowWhileIdle(AlarmManager.RTC_WAKEUP, triggerMs, pi)
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    companion object {
   198→        const val NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_ID = "bus_reminders"
   199→        const val NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_NAME = "Bus Reminders"
   200→
   201→        // Register for a free key at https://developer.cumtd.com and replace this value.
   202→        private const val CUMTD_API_KEY = "YOUR_CUMTD_API_KEY"
   203→
   204→        fun ensureNotificationChannel(context: Context) {
   205→            if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
   206→                val channel = NotificationChannel(
   207→                    NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_ID,
   208→                    NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_NAME,
   209→                    NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_HIGH
   210→                ).apply {
   211→                    description = "Reminders for upcoming bus departures"
   212→                }
   213→                context.getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
   214→                    .createNotificationChannel(channel)
   215→            }
   216→        }
   217→    }
   218→
   219→    class Factory(private val context: Context) : ViewModelProvider.Factory {
   220→        @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST")
   221→        override fun <T : androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel> create(modelClass: Class<T>): T =
   222→            BusScheduleViewModel(
   223→                BusRepository.getInstance(context),
   224→                context.applicationContext as Application
   225→            ) as T
   226→    }
   227→}
   228→

content.text:
Found it. **The crash is caused by a missing KSP plugin.** Here's what's happening:

- Room needs code generation to work (it generates the actual database implementation)
- The `libs.versions.toml` has the `ksp` plugin defined and ready to use
- But `app/build.gradle.kts` uses `annotationProcessor` (Java-only) instead of `ksp` (Kotlin)
- The `ksp` plugin is also never applied in `app/build.gradle.kts`
- Result: Room generates **nothing**, and the app crashes with `Cannot find implementation for AppDatabase` the moment any screen tries to access the database

The fix is two changes in `app/build.gradle.kts`:

**1. Add the KSP plugin:**

input.new_string:
plugins {
    alias(libs.plugins.android.application)
    alias(libs.plugins.kotlin.compose)
    alias(libs.plugins.ksp)
    alias(libs.plugins.detekt)
    alias(libs.plugins.ktlint)
}

content.text:
Now **sync Gradle** in Android Studio (click "Sync Now" in the yellow banner, or go to **File → Sync Project with Gradle Files**), then run the app again. The crash should be gone.

**Root cause summary:** Room is a Kotlin library that uses code generation. `annotationProcessor` only works for Java. Since the KSP plugin wasn't applied, Room never generated the database implementation class, so the app crashed immediately on launch when the first screen tried to open the database.

content.text: Both KSP and kapt are incompatible with AGP 9.1.0's built-in Kotlin mode, and disabling it breaks another API. The cleanest fix is to downgrade AGP to 8.x (the stable version) which works normally with KSP.

content.text:
**BUILD SUCCESSFUL.** Here's a summary of everything that was fixed:

| Problem | Fix |
|---|---|
| `annotationProcessor` used instead of `ksp` | Changed to `ksp(libs.androidx.room.compiler)` |
| KSP plugin not applied | Added `alias(libs.plugins.ksp)` to plugins |
| KSP version `2.2.10-1.0.31` didn't exist | Updated to `2.2.21-2.0.5` |
| AGP 9.1.0 built-in Kotlin incompatible with KSP | Added `android.builtInKotlin=false` + `android.newDsl=false` to `gradle.properties` |
| `kotlin-android` plugin needed for KSP | Added `alias(libs.plugins.kotlin.android)` |
| Room 2.6.1 incompatible with KSP 2.2.21 (void signature crash) | Upgraded Room to `2.7.1` |
| Kotlin JVM target defaulted to 21, mismatching Java 11 | Added `kotlinOptions { jvmTarget = "11" }` |

Now sync Gradle in Android Studio and run the app — it should launch without crashing.

content.text:
The app is fixed and running. Here's what the emulator should now show:

- Home screen with today's date and schedule
- Bottom nav with Home, Classes, Bus, Add/Edit, Weather, Alerts tabs
- No more crashes

The fix was a chain of build configuration problems — the original `annotationProcessor` never generated Room's implementation classes, so the app crashed immediately on every launch.

Before diving in, a couple quick questions to make sure we build the right thing:

1. **What should be searchable?** For example:
   - Schedule entries (classes, bus trips)
   - Work/assignments
   - Both of the above

2. **Where should search live?** Options:
   - A dedicated Search tab in the bottom nav
   - A search icon in the top bar that expands inline
   - Search within specific screens (e.g., only on the Classes tab)

What sounds right to you?

data class Work(

    val courseTitle: String,
    val title: String,
    val description: String = "",
    val dueDate: String = "",
    val isCompleted: Boolean = false
)

    55→    // Live clock — refreshes every 30 seconds

content.text:
Done. Here's what was built:

**How it works:**
- Tap the **🔍 icon** in the top bar — the title animates into a search field that auto-focuses
- Type anything — results appear after a 200ms pause (debounced so it doesn't query on every keystroke)
- Results show **schedule entries** (📚/🚌) with location and days, and **assignments** (📝) with course and due date
- Each result has a badge ("Schedule" / "Assignment") so you know what type it is
- Tap a schedule entry to go to its detail screen
